■ Road Safety Report

Our Highways
Are Unforgiving

The condition of your headlights could quite literally mean the difference between making it home safely, waking up in a hospital, or facing years in a courtroom.

The reality of Island driving: 40% of all fatal and serious-injury crashes happen after 7 PM. When you combine torrential rain, blinding glare from oncoming traffic, and an unlit cyclist on the shoulder, driving with compromised visibility isn't just a risk… It's a recipe for disaster.

The terrifying part is that most drivers don't even realize they are driving blind. UV damage is a slow creep. Month by month, the sun bakes the factory clear coat off your lenses, turning them into a cloudy, yellow cataract… completely unaware your oxidized lenses have destroyed visibility and reaction time.

Seeing an animal half a second too late doesn't just mean a close call. It means the sickening crunch of metal, explosive airbag deployment, a mandatory ICBC deductible, weeks fighting for a rental car, or living with a catastrophic physical injury.

With over 900 drivers injured and 529 wildlife collisions recorded on Hwy 1 and 19 alone last year, faded headlights aren't just a cosmetic annoyance… They can mean the difference between life and death.

40%
Of all fatal and serious-injury crashes happen after 7 PM — when compromised headlights are most deadly.

Key Findings
    The Process

    How It Works

    We don't do driveway quick-fixes, scratch your lenses, or use cheap spray-on clear coats. We operate out of a dedicated restoration studio to ensure absolute meticulous perfection.

    01
    Virtual Diagnosis

    No driving across town just to get an estimate. Simply text us a photo of your headlights. With over 30 years of headlight experience — we don't have to guess. We can instantly diagnose them, give you a firm honest quote, and reserve your time in our shop.

    02
    Proprietary 5-Step Restoration System

    We don't "polish" your headlights — we re-engineer the surface. When you arrive, your vehicle goes through our proprietary 5-step restoration system developed and perfected over decades in the industry. There is nothing else like it on the market, and it cannot be imitated by DIY kits or standard detailing shops.

    03
    Lifetime Guarantee

    Because our 5-step system actually cures the problem instead of just covering it up, we back our work with a guarantee that no local competitor will dare to match: A lifetime warranty. As long as you own the vehicle, your headlights will remain crystal clear. Period.

    Why Island Headlight Safety

    Don't Settle for a Detailer...Trust a Visibility Restoration Specialist™

    To a standard detail shop, your headlights are just another piece of plastic to clean. They treat it as an afterthought — taking shortcuts with cheap buffing compounds and temporary wipe-on waxes that inevitably wash off and turn yellow again after a few months of Island rain.

    We don't do temporary band-aids. Headlight restoration is far too important to be bundled into an auto detail; it is the only thing we do. While the "competition" cuts corners, our proprietary 5-step system permanently restores your vehicle's optical clarity from the ground up.

    • An Ironclad Lifetime Guarantee

      Guaranteed for the life of your vehicle

    • Proprietary 5-Step Reconstruction

      We don't use cheap wipe-on waxes or DIY sprays.

    • Dedicated Local Restoration Studio

      We don't battle driveway dust. We have a local studio in Campbell River.

    • Proof

      You'll see the hard data on exactly how much your visibility has improved.

    Common Questions

    FAQ

    Our UV-cured hard coat is backed by a lifetime warranty — as long as you own the vehicle, your headlights will remain crystal clear. DIY kits typically last 3–8 months before yellowing returns. We use professional-grade materials that bond to the lens surface properly.
    Almost certainly. We work on all makes and models — cars, trucks, SUVs, vans, and commercial vehicles. If the plastic lens is oxidized or yellowed, we can restore it. We've worked on everything from 2005 Corollas to fleet pickup trucks.
    DIY kits sand the lens and apply a thin sealant that wears off quickly — usually within months. Without a UV-cured hard coat applied properly, the oxidation returns fast. We've seen vehicles that were "restored" with kits 4 months ago come in looking worse than before. The results are not the same.
    We come to you. Driveway, workplace parking lot, fleet yard — wherever your vehicle is parked. No drop-offs, no waiting for your car back. Most jobs are done in 30–60 minutes on site.
    Text us a photo of your headlights at (250) 555-0123. We'll send back a quote within minutes. No phone tag, no appointment needed just to find out the price.
